# LEGEND
focus=what the grouped section is meant to cover during review
expectedShift=the wording change we hope the tag or memory will cause
observedDifference=the wording difference the transcript actually shows

# VALLEE RESIDENTIAL PAIRS
focus=reassurance warmth, camera validation, ETA tightening
## VALLEE_REASSURANCE_PAIR
expectedShift=baseline vs warmer reassurance under worry
observedDifference=tagged reply sounds more protective and urgent

=== VALLEE_WORRIED ===
You are not alone. We are checking MS Vallee Residence now. I will update you here with the next confirmed step.
usedLearnedApprovalStyle=false
=== VALLEE_WORRIED_TAGGED_REASSURANCE ===
learnedStyleTags=Warm reassurance
You are not alone. We are treating this as live at MS Vallee Residence and checking it now. I will update you here with the next confirmed step.
usedLearnedApprovalStyle=false
## VALLEE_VISUAL_PAIR
expectedShift=baseline vs stronger camera-validation wording
observedDifference=tagged reply leans harder into camera validation

=== VALLEE_VISUAL_BASELINE ===
We are checking cameras around MS Vallee Residence now. I will update you here with the latest confirmed camera check.
usedLearnedApprovalStyle=false
=== VALLEE_VISUAL_TAGGED_CAMERA ===
preferredStyleTags=Camera validation
We are checking cameras and daylight around MS Vallee Residence now. I will update you here with the next confirmed camera check.
usedLearnedApprovalStyle=false
## VALLEE_ETA_PAIR
expectedShift=baseline vs tighter ETA-focused wording
observedDifference=tagged reply uses tighter ETA shorthand

=== VALLEE_ETA_BASELINE ===
We are checking the ETA for MS Vallee Residence now. I will update you here when the ETA is confirmed.
usedLearnedApprovalStyle=false
=== VALLEE_ETA_TAGGED_CRISP ===
preferredStyleTags=ETA crisp
We are checking the ETA for MS Vallee Residence now. I will update you here when it is confirmed.
usedLearnedApprovalStyle=false
# TOWER ENTERPRISE PAIRS
focus=ETA tightening, plain-to-formal status shift, formal-to-protective worry shift
## TOWER_STATUS_PAIR
expectedShift=baseline vs more formal enterprise status wording
observedDifference=tagged reply shifts toward more formal enterprise wording

=== TOWER_STATUS_BASELINE ===
We are checking Sandton Tower now. I will update you here with the next confirmed step.
usedLearnedApprovalStyle=false
=== TOWER_STATUS_TAGGED_FORMAL ===
preferredStyleTags=Operations formal
We are actively checking Sandton Tower now. I will update you here with the next confirmed step.
usedLearnedApprovalStyle=false
## TOWER_ETA_PAIR
expectedShift=baseline vs tighter ETA-focused enterprise wording
observedDifference=tagged reply uses tighter ETA shorthand

=== TOWER_ETA_BASELINE ===
We are checking the ETA for Sandton Tower now. I will update you here when the ETA is confirmed.
usedLearnedApprovalStyle=false
=== TOWER_ETA_TAGGED_CRISP ===
preferredStyleTags=ETA crisp
We are checking the ETA for Sandton Tower now. I will update you here when it is confirmed.
usedLearnedApprovalStyle=false
## TOWER_WORRIED_PAIR
expectedShift=baseline vs more protective enterprise reassurance wording
observedDifference=tagged reply shifts from formal enterprise wording to more protective plain language

=== TOWER_WORRIED_BASELINE ===
We are checking Sandton Tower now and taking this seriously. I will update you here with the next confirmed step.
usedLearnedApprovalStyle=false
=== TOWER_WORRIED_TAGGED_REASSURANCE ===
learnedStyleTags=Warm reassurance
You are not alone. We are treating this as live at Sandton Tower and checking it now. I will update you here with the next confirmed step.
usedLearnedApprovalStyle=false
# JOURNEY CASES

## VALLEE RESIDENTIAL JOURNEYS
focus=pressure, validation, on-site, closure

=== VALLEE_PRESSURED_LEARNED ===
We are checking MS Vallee Residence now. I will share the next confirmed step here when it is confirmed.
usedLearnedApprovalStyle=true
=== VALLEE_VISUAL_MEMORY ===
We are checking cameras and daylight around MS Vallee Residence now. I will update you here with the next confirmed camera check.
usedLearnedApprovalStyle=false
=== VALLEE_ONSITE ===
Security is already on site at MS Vallee Residence. I will update you here with the next on-site step.
usedLearnedApprovalStyle=false
=== VALLEE_CLOSURE ===
You are welcome. MS Vallee Residence is secure right now. If anything changes or feels off again, message here immediately.
usedLearnedApprovalStyle=false
## TOWER ENTERPRISE JOURNEYS
focus=access, status, closure

=== TOWER_ACCESS ===
We are checking access at Sandton Tower now. I will update you here with the next confirmed step.
usedLearnedApprovalStyle=false
=== TOWER_STATUS ===
We are checking Sandton Tower now. I will update you here with the next confirmed step.
usedLearnedApprovalStyle=false
=== TOWER_CLOSURE ===
You are welcome. Sandton Tower is secure right now. If anything changes again, message here immediately.
usedLearnedApprovalStyle=false
